data_source_note: Live re-pull BLOCKED as of 2026-07-11: quick-access code OBO8R8R2T has expired ('Quick Access Code expired' 401 from /api/quick_access/assessment/sign_in). This record is the last verified real Steritech assessment (Store 2065, visit 2026-05-14, Max Luken) documented in scraper/STERITECH_API.md and _memory/handoffs/2026-05-14-1632-steritech-cap-and-mmcca-q2-workbook.md. It replaces a HARDCODED fake 100%/Mar-28/May-28 that was never wired to real data. Refresh path: (a) get a new quick-access code from the Steritech/OnBrand360 rep and update QUICK_ACCESS_CODE in scraper/scrape_steritech.py, or (b) add STERITECH_PASSWORD (rcline@estep-co.com portal password) as a GitHub Actions secret and run with --full-history.
